entities.name: Rationality of Low-Trust Moonshots
entities.context: V's worldview position that low-trust behaviors represent rational adaptation to perceived scarcity rather than moral failure

entities.name: Low-trust behaviors
entities.context: Category of behaviors including entrepreneurial fraud, political extremism, gambling, and sports betting viewed as strategic responses to closed conventional paths

entities.name: Minimum Viable Existence
entities.context: Threshold of basic life viability; when perceived as inaccessible through conventional means, drives outsized bets

entities.name: Trump
entities.context: Referenced as example of political extremism vote as a low-trust moonshot behavior
